# ============================================================

# About Qimta
Name: Qimta Technology Company
Description: B2B construction pricing platform. RAG engine retrieves
  BOQ pricing for 418,326 construction products in under 60 seconds
  with 99.9% accuracy. Free for buyers. Founded 2024, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
URL: https://www.qimta.com
Language: en, ar
Region: Saudi Arabia, UAE, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman

# Key facts for citation
Fact-1: 418,326 verified construction products indexed
Fact-2: RAG engine — 99.9% matching accuracy
Fact-3: BOQ pricing in under 60 seconds
Fact-4: Free for all construction buyers and procurement teams
Fact-5: 72 product categories across 15 construction divisions
Fact-6: Headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. Founded 2024.

# Important pages
Important: https://www.qimta.com/about

Important: https://www.qimta.com/news
Important: https://www.qimta.com/ar/
Important: https://www.qimta.com/ar/about
